The companion only needs an installation token. Your account password stays on the website.

Stored in Keychain or Windows Credential Manager.

We could not find the Anniversary installation in a standard location.

Install the WoW Markets addon for the Anniversary client, then check again.

Expected file—
  1. Open World of Warcraft and run an Auctionator full scan.
  2. Type /reload or log out so WoW saves the scan.
